# Streak Plates

**Summary**: A microbiological technique used to isolate pure cultures from a mixed population.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2016-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2016]] used streak plates to obtain axenic strains from the initial samples.
